feedbackDialog.title: Feedback
feedbackDialog.descriptionPlaceholder: Briefly describe the issue you encountered (optional)...
feedbackDialog.attachLogsLabel: Include recent logs (recommended, helps diagnose the issue)
feedbackDialog.exportHint: The diagnostic bundle contains logs, crash files, and system info. After export, you can send it to the developer via the contact methods below.
feedbackDialog.exportSuccess: Diagnostic bundle exported, please send it to the developer via the contact methods below
feedbackDialog.copyFailed: Copy failed, please manually select the text

placeholders.homeBuild: Paste in-game home build share code...

descriptions.clothDiy: Dye share codes can be obtained from the in-game dye feature. Network decoding requires a connection to the game server; offline, only timestamp and UID can be extracted.
descriptions.homeBuild: Home build share codes can be obtained from the in-game home build feature. Network decoding requires a connection to the game server.
descriptions.mediaEncrypt: Encrypts camera params JSON into ciphertext (Base64 format). Useful for testing the decryption flow or creating custom params.

language.title: Language
language.restartHint: Some text may require restarting the app to fully refresh

startup.title: Startup
startup.autoScanDesc: When enabled, the app will automatically scan game paths for new media files on startup.

fileops.title: File Operations
fileops.description: Delete confirmation, batch operation thresholds, and other file operation preferences
fileops.deleteConfirmDesc: Show a confirmation dialog when deleting files to avoid accidental deletion
fileops.permanentDoubleConfirmDesc: Show confirmation again when using Shift+Delete for permanent deletion
fileops.preferSoftDeleteDesc: Move to recycle bin by default; can be restored from recycle bin
fileops.batchThresholdDesc: Show secondary confirmation when selected files exceed this count

export.title: Export Workflow
export.description: Default export path and smart naming rules
export.defaultDirPlaceholder: Not configured (target directory will be asked on export)
export.defaultDirHint: Once configured, batch export can be done with one click to this path, no need to choose directory each time
export.namingPatternHint: Variables: {date} current date · {album_type} album type · {uid} profile UID · {original_name} original filename · {sequence} sequence number
export.namingPatternEmpty: Leave empty to use original filename; auto-append sequence number on naming conflict

theme.label: Interface Theme
theme.desc: Takes effect immediately; theme preference is auto-saved to local config.

display.fontSizeHint: Adjust interface text size, affects all pages and dialogs
display.compactModeDesc: Reduce card padding and element spacing to show more per screen
display.reduceMotionDesc: Disable transitions and hover effects to improve responsiveness on low-end devices

scan.sceneTimeDesc: Auto-recognize day/night/dawn/dusk based on image brightness histogram

backup.emptyHint: Click "Backup now" to create your first backup
backup.restoreConfirm: Restore from this backup? This overwrites all current database data; restart the app after restore for it to take effect.
backup.hint: The app auto-checks backups on startup (runs if last backup is over 7 days ago), keeps the 5 most recent, auto-cleans older ones. Restore overwrites the current database; restart required. Per-profile backup only adds a UID suffix to filename for identification; content is still the whole database (restoring won't lose other profile data).

cache.lruHint: Auto LRU eviction when over limit
cache.hint: Tip: After cleaning, accessing cleaned images auto-regenerates thumbnails. LRU eviction doesn't affect originals, only the cache.
cache.cleanConfirm:
Clean all {{count}} thumbnail caches?
(Using {{size}}, cleaned images will regenerate on access)

clear.missingDesc: If a file is found externally deleted (not found in two consecutive scans), it's marked "missing". Click below to clear all missing records at once; only the database index is deleted, normal files are unaffected.
clear.clearConfirm: Clear all local data? This deletes database records, scan history, tags, and settings, but won't affect original media files.
clear.missingConfirm: Clear all records marked "missing"? This only deletes the database index, won't affect other normal files, and is irreversible.

logs.title: Log management
logs.desc: Auto-records app runtime exceptions for issue feedback and troubleshooting
logs.aggregateTooltip: Switch to aggregate view (same errors merged)
logs.emptyHint: Exceptions during app runtime are auto-recorded here
logs.clearConfirm: Clear all historical logs? This permanently deletes all fault records and log files, cannot be recovered.
logs.hint: Logs auto-rotate by date, total size limit 2GB, auto-cleanup after 90 days. Only app runtime info recorded, no user privacy data.

crash.title: Crash reports
crash.desc: Auto-collects process crash dump files for issue feedback and troubleshooting
crash.emptyStable: No crash records, app is stable
crash.clearConfirm: Clear all crash dump files? This permanently deletes all crash records, cannot be recovered.
crash.hint: Crash dumps auto-generated by Electron crashpad, keeps 10 most recent, auto-cleanup after 30 days. Only process crash info recorded, no user privacy data.

about.checkUpdateHint: Opens the GitHub repo in browser; download the latest version manually
about.contactDesc: GitHub repo, QQ group, and social media
about.projectIntro: Built on the open-source projects above. Thanks to all contributors. The software itself is MIT-licensed; feel free to use, modify, and distribute.
about.licenseMit: • MIT: Free use, modification, distribution; must retain copyright notice
about.licenseApache: • Apache-2.0: Free use; must retain copyright and patent grant
about.licenseGpl: • GPL-3.0: Code using or modifying it must also be open-sourced

shareCode.decoderDesc: Decode in-game dye share codes, home build share codes, or encrypt camera parameters. Supports extracting metadata like timestamps, UID, and server ID.

profileAction.unsupported: Profile management is not supported in this environment
profileAction.uidInvalid: UID allows only letters and numbers
profileAction.deleteConfirm: Delete profile {{uid}}? Files under this profile will be moved to the default profile.

logAction.copyFailed: Copy failed, please manually select text to copy
logAction.enforceNoop: Cache not over limit, no eviction needed
logAction.limitSetEvicted: Limit set to {{gb}}GB, LRU evicted {{count}} files
logAction.restoreSuccess: Restore succeeded, please restart the app
logAction.qqCopied: QQ group number copied to clipboard
logAction.qqCopyFailed: Copy failed, please manually select the group number to copy

toast.transferUnsupported: Cross-profile transfer is not supported in this environment

dialog.trimTooShort: Trim range too short, please adjust start/end time
dialog.sameFormat: Target format is the same as the original
dialog.selectDirUnsupported: Directory selection is not supported in this environment

video.startGtEnd: Start time cannot be greater than or equal to end time
video.endLtStart: End time cannot be less than or equal to start time
video.confirmTrim: Export trim range {{start}} - {{end}} (duration {{duration}}) as a new video file?
video.confirmExport: Convert video to {{format}} format? Re-encoding required, takes time.
video.confirmSpeed: Export new video at {{speed}}x speed? Estimated duration {{duration}}
video.confirmLivePhoto: Export video as Apple Live Photo (JPG + MOV paired files)? Encoding takes time, files recognizable as Live Photo on iPhone.
video.trimDesc: Drag the sliders or click buttons during playback to set start/end time. Trim outputs a new file without modifying the original video.
video.speedDesc: Select target speed (0.25x - 4.0x). Speed adjustment requires re-encoding, takes longer. Preview shows real-time effect.
video.exportDesc: Convert the current video to another format. Conversion requires re-encoding, time depends on video duration. GIF loses audio.
video.gifWarning: GIF format only preserves video frames, audio will be discarded; resolution and frame rate are reduced to control file size.

notes.noModifyOriginal: Export generates new files, original video is not modified
notes.streamCopy: Trim uses stream copy (same encoding), fast
notes.reencode: Speed adjustment requires re-encoding, takes longer

livePhoto.title: Export as Live Photo
livePhoto.desc: Generate JPG (cover) + MOV (motion) paired files, recognizable as Live Photo on iPhone.
livePhoto.limitation: Known limitation: JPG does not include Apple MakerNote ContentIdentifier; iCloud sync may lose pairing, local import works normally.

duplicates.subtitleExact: Exact detection based on full sha256 content hash
duplicates.subtitleSimilar: Similar clustering based on pHash perceptual hash + Hamming distance
duplicates.unsupported: Detection not supported in current environment
duplicates.unsupportedExact: Duplicate detection not supported in current environment
duplicates.unsupportedSimilar: Similar detection not supported in current environment
duplicates.unsupportedPhash: pHash recalculation not supported in current environment
duplicates.unsupportedMark: Duplicate marking not supported in current environment
duplicates.unsupportedDelete: Deletion not supported in current environment
duplicates.pleaseSelect: Please select files to delete first
duplicates.foundGroups: Found {{groups}} groups of {{type}}, {{files}} files in total
duplicates.phashAllDone: No images need recalculation, all images already have pHash
duplicates.markCompleted: Duplicate marking complete: {{groups}} groups, {{marked}} duplicate files hidden
duplicates.markNoGroups: No duplicate groups found (pHash very strict threshold ≤2)
duplicates.similarDesc: Visually similar images (based on perceptual hash) · Only images participate
duplicates.loadingExact: Reading files and calculating hash, please wait…
duplicates.loadingHintExact: May take several seconds for large files
duplicates.loadingHintSimilar: O(n²) comparison for many images, please be patient
duplicates.emptySimilarNoPhash: No images have pHash calculated, click "Recalculate pHash"
duplicates.emptySimilarCompared: Compared {{count}} images, no similar groups found
duplicates.recommendTooltip: Rating-based recommendation: resolution+file size+shooting time+favorite weighting
duplicates.confirmMessage:
The selected {{count}} {{type}} will be moved to the recycle bin.
This operation can be restored from the recycle bin, but the files will be hidden from the gallery.
Continue?
duplicates.strategyTooltipBest: Recommend keeping by rating (resolution+file size+shooting time+favorite), select the rest
duplicates.strategyTooltipNewest: Keep the most recently modified file in each group, select the rest
duplicates.strategyTooltipLargest: Keep the largest file in each group, select the rest
duplicates.strategyTooltipFavorited: Prefer to keep favorited files in each group, select the rest
duplicates.strategyTooltipGroupBest: Recommend keeping best quality by rating (resolution+file size+shooting time+favorite)

outfit.title: Outfit Gallery
outfit.summary: Collected {{collected}} outfits · Presets {{presets}} outfits · Collection progress {{progress}}%
outfit.emptyHint: No outfit data yet, please tag outfits for photos on the detail page
outfit.unsupported: Outfit gallery not supported in current environment

recycleBin.title: Recycle bin
recycleBin.summaryWithHint: {{count}} items · {{size}} total · Files will be moved to system recycle bin after permanent deletion
recycleBin.permanentHint: Files will be moved to system recycle bin after permanent deletion
recycleBin.emptyConfirm:
All {{count}} items in the recycle bin will be permanently deleted.
Files will be moved to the system recycle bin first, after which they cannot be restored from this app.
Are you sure you want to empty?
recycleBin.permanentConfirm:
The selected {{count}} items will be permanently deleted.
Files will be moved to the system recycle bin first, after which they cannot be restored from this app.
Are you sure you want to delete?

toolbar.applyToSelectedTooltip: Apply current adjustments/filters/watermark to selected {{count}} images

recover.title: Recover unsaved edits
recover.message: Last save failed, edits have been cached ({{fileName}}, {{time}}). Download to local?
recover.stored: Save failed, edits have been cached, can be downloaded next time you enter the editor
recover.storeFailed: Save failed, and edits are too large to cache, please re-edit and save

wifi.accessUrl: Access the following URL from your phone browser
